Coded Citadel

Solo developer building Chrome extensions and web apps in public on YouTube.
Documenting the journey from $0 to $100K, one product at a time.

Extensions

YT Comments Exporter: Free Chrome extension that exports all comments from any YouTube video to CSV instantly.
YouTube Filter Pro: Free Chrome extension that filters YouTube search results and homepage content.

About
Coded Citadel is a building-in-public project. Every product is built live
on YouTube and shipped as a real Chrome extension or web app. All metrics
(installs, active users, revenue) are published openly on each product page.
YouTube
https://www.youtube.com/@CodedCitadel
Instagram
